nasb.text: There is nothing better for a man than to eat and drink and tell himself that his labor is good. This also I have seen that it is from the hand of God.

esv.text: There is nothing better for a person than that he should eat and drink and find enjoyment in his toil. This also, I saw, is from the hand of God,

cnv.text: 人最好是吃喝，在自己的勞碌中自得其樂；我看這也是出於　神的手。

ccb.text: 对人而言，没有什么比吃喝并享受劳碌之乐更好，我看这也是出自上帝的手。

csbs.text: 对人而言，没有什么比吃喝并在劳苦中找到快乐更好的了！在我看，这也是出于神的手；
